      let sm={};if(ids){const sd=await yt(`https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/videos?part=statistics&id=${ids}&key=${API_KEY}`);(sd.items||[]).forEach(v=>{sm[v.id]=v.statistics;});}
      appendCards(items.map(i=>({...i,id:i.id?.videoId,statistics:sm[i.id?.videoId]||{}})));setScroll(d.nextPageToken);
    }else if(curMode==='liked'){
      const d=await ytAuth(`https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/videos?part=snippet,statistics&myRating=like&maxResults=${S.perPage}&pageToken=${nextPage}`);
      appendCards(d.items||[]);setScroll(d.nextPageToken);
    }else if(curMode==='subscriptions'){
      const d=await ytAuth(`https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/subscriptions?part=snippet&mine=true&maxResults=50&order=alphabetical&pageToken=${nextPage}`);
      appendChanCards(d.items||[]);setScroll(d.nextPageToken);
    }
  }catch(e){hideBL();hasMore=false;}finally{loading=false;}
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
//  SHORTS PLAYER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
function openSP(idx){
  spIdx=idx;
  document.getElementById('sp').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
  renderSP(spIdx,'');
  document.addEventListener('keydown',spKey);
  const ov=document.getElementById('sp');
  ov.addEventListener('wheel',spWheel,{passive:false});
  let ty=0;
  ov.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{ty=e.touches[0].clientY;},{passive:true});
  ov.addEventListener('touchend',e=>{const d=ty-e.changedTouches[0].clientY;if(Math.abs(d)>40)spNav(d>0?1:-1);},{passive:true});
}
function closeSP(){document.getElementById('sp').classList.remove('open');document.getElementById('spBox').innerHTML='';document.body.style.overflow='';document.removeEventListener('keydown',spKey);}
function spKey(e){if(e.key==='Escape')closeSP();else if(e.key==='ArrowDown')spNav(1);else if(e.key==='ArrowUp')spNav(-1);}
let spWc=false;
function spWheel(e){e.preventDefault();if(spWc)return;spWc=true;spNav(e.deltaY>0?1:-1);setTimeout(()=>{spWc=false;},500);}
async function spNav(dir){
  if(spGoing)return;
  const ni=spIdx+dir;
  if(ni<0)return;
  if(ni>=spVids.length-3&&hasMore&&!loading)loadMore();
  if(ni>=spVids.length){if(!hasMore)showToast('End of Shorts','No more to load!','info',false);return;}
  spGoing=true;
  const box=document.getElementById('spBox');
  const ec=dir===1?'sp-exit-up':'sp-exit-down',nc=dir===1?'sp-enter-up':'sp-enter-down';
  box.classList.add(ec);
  await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,200));
  box.classList.remove(ec);spIdx=ni;
  renderSP(spIdx,nc);
  setTimeout(()=>{box.classList.add(nc);setTimeout(()=>{box.classList.remove(nc);spGoing=false;},320);},40);
  document.getElementById('spPrev').disabled=spIdx===0;
}
function renderSP(idx){
  const v=spVids[idx];if(!v)return;
  const sn=v.snippet||{},st=v.statistics||{},id=v.id||'',chan=sn.channelTitle||'',cid=sn.channelId||'',bg=aC(chan);
  spVid=id;spVidComments=parseInt(st.commentCount||0);spChanId=cid;
  document.getElementById('spTitle').textContent=sn.title||'';
  document.getElementById('spChan').textContent=chan;
  document.getElementById('spLikes').textContent=st.likeCount?fN(st.likeCount):'Like';
  document.getElementById('spComments').textContent=st.commentCount?fN(st.commentCount):'Comments';
  document.getElementById('spCounter').textContent=`${idx+1} / ${spVids.length}`;
  document.getElementById('spProg').style.width=spVids.length>1?Math.round((idx/(spVids.length-1))*100)+'%':'0%';
  document.getElementById('spPrev').disabled=idx===0;
  document.getElementById('spSub').className='sp-sub';document.getElementById('spSub').textContent='Subscribe';
  document.getElementById('spLikeBtn').classList.remove('on');
  // Channel avatar
  const avEl=document.getElementById('spAv');
  const cc=chanCache.get(cid);
  if(cc?.thumb){avEl.innerHTML=`<img src="${cc.thumb}" alt="">`;avEl.style.background='transparent';}
  else{avEl.innerHTML=`<span style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#fff">${ini(chan)}</span>`;avEl.style.background=bg;if(cid)fetchAvatars([v]).then(()=>{const c2=chanCache.get(cid);if(c2?.thumb){avEl.innerHTML=`<img src="${c2.thumb}" alt="">`;avEl.style.background='transparent';}}).catch(()=>{});}
  const ap=S.autoplay==='true'?1:0;
  const box=document.getElementById('spBox');
  document.getElementById('spLoad').style.display='flex';
  box.innerHTML=`<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/${id}?autoplay=${ap}&rel=0&modestbranding=1" allow="accelerometer;autoplay;clipboard-write;encrypted-media;gyroscope;picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen onload="document.getElementById('spLoad').style.display='none'"></iframe>`;
}
function spGoChannel(){if(spChanId){const nm=document.getElementById('spChan').textContent;closeSP();loadChanView(spChanId,nm);}}
function spSubscribe(){if(!ACCESS_TOKEN){showToast('Sign in to subscribe','','info',false);return;}const btn=document.getElementById('spSub');btn.textContent='Subscribed ✓';btn.className='sp-sub on';showToast('Subscribed!',`Now subscribed to ${document.getElementById('spChan').textContent}.`,'success',false);}
function spLike(){if(!ACCESS_TOKEN){showToast('Sign in to like','','info',false);return;}document.getElementById('spLikeBtn').classList.toggle('on');showToast(document.getElementById('spLikeBtn').classList.contains('on')?'Liked!':'Like removed','','success',false);}
function spDislike(btn){btn.classList.toggle('on');showToast('Noted','','info',false);}
function spShare(){const u=`https://youtu.be/${spVid}`;if(navigator.share)navigator.share({url:u});else navigator.clipboard.writeText(u).then(()=>showToast('Link copied!',u,'success',false));}
function spYT(){window.open(`https://www.youtube.com/shorts/${spVid}`,'_blank');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
//  COMMENTS PANEL
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
function openComments(videoId, commentCount, isShorts=false){
  if(!videoId)return;
  cmtsVid=videoId;cmtsNext='';cmtsForShorts=isShorts;
  const ct=document.getElementById('cmtsCount');
  ct.textContent=commentCount?fN(commentCount)+' comments':'';
  document.getElementById('cmtsBody').innerHTML=`<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;padding:40px"><div class="spinner"></div></div>`;
  document.getElementById('cmtsPanel').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('cmtsBd').classList.add('open');
  if(!isShorts)document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
  loadComments();
}
function closeComments(){
  document.getElementById('cmtsPanel').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('cmtsBd').classList.remove('open');
  if(!cmtsForShorts)document.body.style.overflow='';
  cmtsVid='';
}
async function reloadComments(){cmtsNext='';document.getElementById('cmtsBody').innerHTML='';await loadComments();}
async function loadComments(append=false){
  if(cmtsLoading||!cmtsVid)return;
  cmtsLoading=true;
  try{
    const sort=document.getElementById('cmtsSort').value;
    const tk=cmtsNext?`&pageToken=${cmtsNext}`:'';
    const d=await yt(`https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/commentThreads?part=snippet,replies&videoId=${cmtsVid}&maxResults=20&order=${sort}${tk}&key=${API_KEY}`);
    cmtsNext=d.nextPageToken||'';
    const body=document.getElementById('cmtsBody');
    if(!append)body.innerHTML='';
    if(!d.items?.length&&!append){body.innerHTML=`<div class="cmts-empty"><span class="material-icons">chat_bubble_outline</span><p>No comments available.<br>Comments may be turned off.</p></div>`;return;}
    d.items.forEach(t=>renderCmt(t,body));
    // Remove old load more btn
    const old=body.querySelector('.cmts-load-more');if(old)old.remove();
    if(cmtsNext){const btn=document.createElement('button');btn.className='cmts-load-more';btn.textContent='Load more comments';btn.onclick=()=>{btn.textContent='Loading…';btn.disabled=true;loadComments(true);};body.appendChild(btn);}
  }catch(e){
    const body=document.getElementById('cmtsBody');
    body.innerHTML=`<div class="cmts-empty"><span class="material-icons">block</span><p>${e.message.includes('disabled')||e.message.includes('403')?'Comments are disabled for this video.':e.message}</p></div>`;
  }finally{cmtsLoading=false;}
}
function renderCmt(thread, container, isReply=false){
  const c=thread.snippet?.topLevelComment?.snippet||thread.snippet||{};
  const txt=(c.textDisplay||'').replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi,'\n').replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'');
  const name=c.authorDisplayName||'Anonymous',avUrl=c.authorProfileImageUrl||'',likes=c.likeCount||0,time=c.publishedAt?ago(c.publishedAt):'',bg=aC(name);
  const replyCnt=thread.snippet?.totalReplyCount||0;
  const replies=thread.replies?.comments||[];
  const el=document.createElement('div');el.className='cmt';
  el.innerHTML=`<div class="cmt-av">${avUrl?`<img src="${avUrl}" alt="" onerror="this.parentElement.innerHTML='${ini(name)}'">`:''}${!avUrl?ini(name):''}</div><div class="cmt-body"><div class="cmt-meta"><span class="cmt-author">${name}</span><span class="cmt-time">${time}</span></div><div class="cmt-text">${txt}</div><div class="cmt-actions"><button class="cmt-like"><span class="material-icons">thumb_up</span>${likes?fN(likes):''}</button>${replyCnt>0&&!isReply?`<button class="cmt-replies-btn" onclick="toggleReplies(this,'${thread.id||''}')"><span class="material-icons" style="font-size:14px;vertical-align:middle">expand_more</span> ${replyCnt} ${replyCnt===1?'reply':'replies'}</button>`:''}</div>${replies.length&&!isReply?`<div class="cmt-replies" id="replies_${thread.id||''}">${replies.slice(0,3).map(r=>{const rc=r.snippet||{};const rt=rc.textDisplay?.replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'')||'',rn=rc.authorDisplayName||'',rav=rc.authorProfileImageUrl||'',rbg=aC(rn);return`<div class="cmt" style="padding:8px 0"><div class="cmt-av" style="width:28px;height:28px;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0">${rav?`<img src="${rav}" alt="" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%">`:''}${!rav?ini(rn):''}</div><div class="cmt-body"><div class="cmt-meta"><span class="cmt-author">${rn}</span><span class="cmt-time">${rc.publishedAt?ago(rc.publishedAt):''}</span></div><div class="cmt-text">${rt}</div></div></div>`}).join('')}</div>`:''}</div>`;
  if(avUrl)el.querySelector('.cmt-av').style.background='transparent';else el.querySelector('.cmt-av').style.background=bg;
  container.appendChild(el);
}
function toggleReplies(btn,tid){const div=document.getElementById('replies_'+tid);if(!div)return;const open=div.classList.toggle('open');btn.innerHTML=open?`<span class="material-icons" style="font-size:14px;vertical-align:middle">expand_less</span> Hide replies`:`<span class="material-icons" style="font-size:14px;vertical-align:middle">expand_more</span> View replies`;}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
//  VIDEO MODAL
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
async function openVid(videoId, videoData){
  if(!videoId)return;
  curVid=videoId;curVidComments=0;
  const sn=videoData.snippet||{},chan=sn.channelTitle||'',cid=sn.channelId||'',bg=aC(chan);
  const pub=sn.publishedAt?new Date(sn.publishedAt).toLocaleDateString('en-US',{year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'}):'';
  document.getElementById('playerBox').innerHTML=`<div class="ply-load"><div class="spinner" style="width:40px;height:40px"></div><span>Loading…</span></div>`;
  document.getElementById('mTitle').textContent=sn.title||'';
  document.getElementById('mDesc').textContent=sn.description||'No description.';
  document.getElementById('mDesc').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('mStats').textContent='';
  document.getElementById('likeLabel').textContent='Like';
  document.getElementById('likeBtn').classList.remove('on');
  document.getElementById('cmtBtn').innerHTML='<span class="material-icons">chat_bubble_outline</span><span>Comments</span>';
  const cc=chanCache.get(cid);
  const avHtml=cc?.thumb?`<img src="${cc.thumb}" alt="">`:`<span style="font-size:19px;font-weight:700;color:#fff">${ini(chan)}</span>`;
  document.getElementById('mChan').innerHTML=`<div class="chan-av-md" data-cid="${cid}" style="background:${cc?.thumb?'transparent':bg}" onclick="loadChanView('${cid}','${chan}');closeModal()">${avHtml}</div><div><div class="chan-nm">${chan}</div><div class="chan-subs" id="chanSubs">Loading…</div></div><button class="sub-btn" id="subBtn" onclick="handleSub('${cid}','${chan}')">Subscribe</button>`;
  document.getElementById('overlay').classList.add('open');document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
  try{
    const d=await yt(`https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/videos?part=snippet,statistics,status&id=${videoId}&key=${API_KEY}`);
    const item=d.items?.[0];if(!item){document.getElementById('playerBox').innerHTML=`<div class="embed-blocked"><span class="material-icons">error_outline</span><h3>Video not found</h3></div>`;return;}
    const s=item.statistics,emb=item.status?.embeddable!==false;
    curVidComments=parseInt(s.commentCount||0);
    document.getElementById('mTitle').textContent=item.snippet.title;
    document.getElementById('mDesc').textContent=item.snippet.description||'No description.';
    document.getElementById('likeLabel').textContent=s.likeCount?fN(s.likeCount):'Like';
    document.getElementById('mStats').textContent=[fV(s.viewCount),pub].filter(Boolean).join(' · ');
    if(s.commentCount){document.getElementById('cmtBtn').innerHTML=`<span class="material-icons">chat_bubble_outline</span><span>${fN(s.commentCount)}</span>`;}
    if(emb){const ap=S.autoplay==='true'?1:0;document.getElementById('playerBox').innerHTML=`<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/${videoId}?autoplay=${ap}&rel=0" allow="accelerometer;autoplay;clipboard-write;encrypted-media;gyroscope;picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>`;}
    else{const hi=item.snippet.thumbnails?.maxres?.url||item.snippet.thumbnails?.high?.url||'';document.getElementById('playerBox').innerHTML=`<div class="embed-blocked">${hi?`<img src="${hi}" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;opacity:.2"/>`:''}<span class="material-icons">videocam_off</span><h3>Embedding disabled by creator</h3><p>Watch this video directly on YouTube.</p><a class="watch-yt" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=${videoId}" target="_blank"><svg width="16" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"/></svg>Watch on YouTube</a></div>`;}
    if(item.snippet.channelId){
      if(!chanCache.has(item.snippet.channelId))await fetchAvatars([item]);
      const cc2=chanCache.get(item.snippet.channelId);
      if(cc2?.thumb){const avEl=document.querySelector('.chan-av-md');if(avEl){avEl.innerHTML=`<img src="${cc2.thumb}" alt="">`;avEl.style.background='transparent';}}
      yt(`https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/channels?part=statistics&id=${item.snippet.channelId}&key=${API_KEY}`).then(cd=>{const el=document.getElementById('chanSubs');const n=cd.items?.[0]?.statistics?.subscriberCount;if(el)el.textContent=n?fN(n)+' subscribers':'';}).catch(()=>{});
    }
  }catch(e){document.getElementById('playerBox').innerHTML=`<div class="embed-blocked"><span class="material-icons">error_outline</span><h3>Could not load video</h3><p>${e.message}</p><a class="watch-yt" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=${videoId}" target="_blank">Watch on YouTube</a></div>`;}
}
function handleSub(cid,nm){if(!ACCESS_TOKEN){showToast('Sign in to subscribe','','info',false);return;}const btn=document.getElementById('subBtn');btn.textContent='Subscribed';btn.className='sub-btn on';showToast('Subscribed!',`Now subscribed to ${nm}.`,'success',false);}
function toggleLike(){if(!ACCESS_TOKEN){showToast('Sign in to like','','info',false);return;}document.getElementById('likeBtn').classList.toggle('on');showToast(document.getElementById('likeBtn').classList.contains('on')?'Liked!':'Like removed','','success',false);}
function closeModal(){document.getElementById('overlay').classList.remove('open');document.getElementById('playerBox').innerHTML='';document.body.style.overflow='';curVid='';}
function overlayClick(e){if(e.target===document.getElementById('overlay'))closeModal();}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(document.getElementById('sp').classList.contains('open'))return;if(e.key==='Escape'){if(document.getElementById('cmtsPanel').classList.contains('open'))closeComments();else if(document.getElementById('overlay').classList.contains('open'))closeModal();else closeSettings();}});
function shareVideo(){const u=`https://youtu.be/${curVid}`;if(navigator.share)navigator.share({url:u,title:document.getElementById('mTitle').textContent});else navigator.clipboard.writeText(u).then(()=>showToast('Link copied!',u,'success',false));}
function openOnYT(){window.open(`https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=${curVid}`,'_blank');}

// ══ TOAST ══
function showToast(title,msg,type='error',showSettings=true){
  clearTimeout(toastTimer);
  const icons={error:'error_outline',success:'check_circle',info:'info'};
  const colors={error:'var(--red)',success:'var(--green)',info:'var(--blue)'};
  document.getElementById('tIcon').textContent=icons[type]||icons.error;
  document.getElementById('tIcon').style.color=colors[type]||colors.error;
  document.getElementById('tTitle').textContent=title;
  document.getElementById('tMsg').textContent=msg;
  document.getElementById('tActs').innerHTML=showSettings?`<button class="t-btn p" onclick="openSettings();hideToast()">Open Settings</button><button class="t-btn s" onclick="hideToast()">Dismiss</button>`:`<button class="t-btn s" onclick="hideToast()">Dismiss</button>`;
  document.getElementById('toast').classList.add('show');
  toastTimer=setTimeout(hideToast,6000);
}
function hideToast(){document.getElementById('toast').classList.remove('show');}
</script>
</body>
</html>
